title: Cursed Team-Building
theme: Corporate bonding speedruns a preventable HR meeting.

nodes.prompt: Your manager says today's trust exercise will involve a fog machine and one live goose.
nodes.resultText: The room chooses how publicly this offsite will fail.

choices.label: Follow the goose
choices.resultText: The room decides the goose has the strongest leadership energy in the building.

choices.label: Pitch synergy deck
choices.resultText: Instead of escaping, the team volunteers a slide deck and makes the offsite worse on purpose.

choices.label: Hide in catering
choices.resultText: Morale collapses into a buffet strategy and everyone pretends that counts as alignment.

nodes.prompt: The goose leads everyone into the CEO's meditation pod.
nodes.resultText: The room converts a bird incident into executive disruption.

choices.label: Call it innovation
choices.resultText: The room reframes a bird incident as disruptive thinking and drags leadership into it.

choices.label: Elect the goose chair
choices.resultText: Democracy fails instantly and the goose acquires executive authority.

nodes.prompt: Your slide deck opens with a typo so bad that finance starts crying.
nodes.resultText: The room decides whether to double down or weaponize confidence.

choices.label: Present harder
choices.resultText: The room mistakes volume for recovery and turns the typo into a company-wide event.

choices.label: Blame auto-correct
choices.resultText: The deck dies, accountability evaporates, and the goose keeps gaining power.

nodes.prompt: Catering is only sparkling water and one suspicious sheet cake.
nodes.resultText: The room chooses the exact flavor of morale collapse.

choices.label: Launch cake committee
choices.resultText: The room creates governance around one suspicious cake and accidentally triggers HR.

choices.label: Expense the vibes
choices.resultText: Someone tries filing morale as an expense and the goose emerges as the only adult present.

nodes.prompt: HR describes the offsite as unforgettable for all the wrong legal reasons.
The goose is promoted ahead of the entire product org.
